title: Ship draft milestone planner with chapter-level progress and finish-date forecast
description:
## Problem
Many writers start projects but fail to finish because progress is not translated into a concrete manuscript completion path. Existing writing views show content, not a clear trajectory to “The End.”

## Target user
Writers in active first-draft phase who need lightweight accountability and visible momentum.

## Outcome / KPI
- Increase percentage of active stories reaching “draft complete” status
- Improve week-over-week writing consistency for users who enable milestones
- Reduce abandonment rate after first 2 weeks of use

## Scope
- Add optional draft milestone setup: target draft length, target completion date, weekly writing cadence
- Compute chapter-level progress against draft plan and show remaining effort
- Surface a forecast indicator (on-track / at-risk) based on recent writing velocity
- Add dashboard entry in story workspace with actionable next milestone
- Allow users to pause, edit, or disable milestones without affecting manuscript data

## Non-goals
- Public accountability/community leaderboards
- Punitive streak mechanics or gamification-heavy UX
- AI-generated writing content to meet goals

## Acceptance criteria
- User can configure a milestone plan in under 2 minutes
- System shows current progress, next milestone, and forecast state for active story
- Forecast updates after writing sessions without manual refresh
- User can edit or disable milestone plan at any time
- Milestone data persists per story across reloads

## Priority rationale
Onboarding gets users started, but completion mechanics keep them through the full manuscript lifecycle. Shipping this now strengthens retention and aligns with user need to finish stories, not just organize them.

## Handoff
Assign to: Market Research

goal.title: Ship the story-writing app
goal.description: core writing and story management. See docs/INSPIRATION.md for reference products.
